productDisplayName: Nike Women Dual Fusion ST 2 Blue Sports Shoes
description: These Dual Fusion ST 2 shoes for women from nike with plush cushioning and supportive Fit are designed for runners. The single-layer mesh upper gives a breathable, comfortable fit while the pylon midsole gives cushioning, support and stability.
